changelog:
Prevent Claude Code's 300-second stream-idle reset during long agent tool generation. Guarded /v1/messages streams now forward thinking deltas before actionable output and emit a thinking heartbeat while large tool arguments are still arriving, while preserving endpoint/account failover until visible text or a complete tool call is committed. Auto routing prioritizes Runtime and Kiro IDE for guarded tool requests, and exhausted empty-response retries continue with another account.
防止 Claude Code 在长 Agent 工具生成期间因 300 秒无内容分块而重置连接。受保护的 /v1/messages 流现在会在正文或完整工具调用前实时转发 thinking delta，并在大型工具参数持续到达时发送 thinking 心跳；正文或完整工具尚未提交时仍可切换端点与账号。自动路由会为受保护工具请求优先使用 Runtime 和 Kiro IDE，空响应端点重试用尽后仍会继续切换账号。
